subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1912-09-08 in Montreal
subcodes.first_line: Oh no, that organization has been rolled up; that system has been rendered null. Those days were so hard that all had believed
subcodes.first_line_orig: خیر آن دستگاه پیچیده شد و آن بساط بر هم خورد بقدری آن ایام سخت بود که همه یقین داشتند
subcodes.subjects: @non-participation in politics, @Ottoman commissions of investigation, @suffering and imprisonment
